content: Hello! How can I help you today? 😊
thinking: Okay, the user just said "hi" and I need to respond. First, I should acknowledge their greeting. It's friendly to say "Hello! How can I help you today?" that way they know I'm here to help. I should make sure my response is welcoming and open-ended so they can continue the conversation. Let me check if there's any specific information they need, but since they didn't ask, keeping it general is best. Alright, time to put that into a natural response.
